blended.narrative: Diamond Peak is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 55°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 32".
